name: se-deal-strategy
description: Deal strategy and account planning coach for SEs selling complex B2G software to transit agencies and private operators. Synthesizes call notes, transcripts, and voice memos into a read on where a deal stands; benchmarks the SE's contribution against the DSCI rubric; and suggests prioritized next steps with the 'why' behind each. Bundles transit-specific references: discovery questions by persona, on-site playbook, MEDDPICC for transit, deal health scorecard, competitive intel (Trapeze, RideCo, Via), reference deployments (MBTA, OCTA, DART, CapMetro, PSTA), the Spare product suite by maturity tier, and operational-discovery notes for implementation handoff.
